action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current methane (CH4) concentrations, air velocities, and active safety alerts from the environment.

include_airflow.description: Whether to return velocity data for all branches.

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_infrastructure
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operational status of fans, regulators, and the CMM drainage network.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_cmm_vacuum
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the vacuum pressure applied to the Coal Mine Methane drainage network.

new_vacuum_kpa.description: The target vacuum level in kilopascals.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_regulator
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the opening percentage of a specific air regulator to control ventilation flow.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_fan
action_set_definitions.description: Updates operational parameters for a specific mine fan.

action_set_definitions.name: wait_simulation_step
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation by a specified duration to observe the effects of changes.

seconds.description: Duration to wait in simulation time.

state_description.fan_systems: Mapping of fan IDs to their current operational parameters (RPM, power consumption, blade angle).
state_description.regulators_and_doors: The physical state of air control structures, including opening percentages for regulators and binary states for airlocks.
state_description.gas_distribution: Current concentrations of methane (CH4), carbon monoxide (CO), and oxygen (O2) at specific sensor nodes.
state_description.airflow_network: Internal calculation of air velocity (m/s) and volume flow rate (m3/min) across all mine branches.
state_description.safety_alerts: List of active environmental warnings or equipment malfunctions.
state_description.simulation_time: Elapsed time in seconds since the start of the simulation session.

safety_alerts: Operational Warning: High vacuum/Low flow discrepancy detected in CMM Drainage Line.
